failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the catalog search result and selected the higher-priced smartphone as the cheapest.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone using the catalog evidence. The tool output at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 first, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 1507389580 at $1157.86 was the cheapest, which directly contradicts the tool result. This is not an invalid tool invocation, underspecification, or unsupported intent; it is incorrect reasoning over the tool output.
